items.title: HTTP API service
items.desc: Single Go process: net/http, no framework. Routes: GET /:slug (hot path), POST /api/links, GET /api/links/:slug, GET /api/links/:slug/stats, plus a tiny dashboard SPA served from go:embed.
items.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><rect x='4' y='4' width='40' height='52' fill='none' stroke='var(--ink-2)' stroke-width='0.6'/><text x='24' y='12' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4.5' fill='var(--ink-2)' text-anchor='middle'>net/http</text><text x='24' y='17' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.2' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>(go:embed)</text><text x='8' y='26' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--accent)'>GET /:slug</text><text x='8' y='32' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--ink-2)'>POST /api/links</text><text x='8' y='38' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--ink-2)'>GET  /api/links/:s</text><text x='8' y='44' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--ink-2)'>GET  /…/:s/stats</text><text x='8' y='50' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--ink-2)'>GET  /         (SPA)</text><line x1='44' y1='30' x2='58' y2='30' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.5' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><polygon points='54,27 58,30 54,33' fill='var(--ink-3)'/><use href='wf:phone-tabs' x='60' y='6' width='36' height='48'/></svg>

items.title: Link storage backend
items.desc: Where the slug → target map lives. The hot path issues one read per redirect; the cold path writes one row per created link.
items.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><use href='arch:api' x='2' y='22' width='24' height='16'/><line x1='26' y1='27' x2='40' y2='27' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='36,24 40,27 36,30' fill='var(--accent)'/><text x='33' y='22' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>read</text><line x1='40' y1='33' x2='26' y2='33' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.6' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><polygon points='30,30 26,33 30,36' fill='var(--ink-3)'/><text x='33' y='40' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>write</text><use href='arch:database' x='42' y='22' width='24' height='16'/><text x='54' y='48' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--ink-2)' text-anchor='middle'>slug → target</text><line x1='66' y1='30' x2='78' y2='30' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.4' stroke-dasharray='1.5 1.5'/><rect x='80' y='14' width='18' height='32' fill='none' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.4'/><text x='89' y='22' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.2' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>1 read</text><text x='89' y='28' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.2' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>per 302</text><text x='89' y='38' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.2' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>1 write</text><text x='89' y='44' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.2' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>per link</text></svg>

options.name: SQLite (single file)
options.desc: Embedded, one file, zero ops. Best for ≤1M links and one VPS. Backup = scp the file. Default choice.
options.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><rect x='28' y='10' width='44' height='34' fill='none' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2'/><text x='50' y='24' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='5.5' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>clipsi.db</text><text x='50' y='34' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--ink-2)' text-anchor='middle'>≤ 1M rows</text><text x='50' y='40' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>(in-process)</text><text x='50' y='54' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--ink-2)' text-anchor='middle'>backup = scp</text></svg>
options.recommendation: OVR-3 caps us at one $5 VPS, NFR-2 wants durability without an external dep, and the audience (3-50 person teams) won't outgrow SQLite's ~1M-row sweet spot in the lifetime of this tool. The other two options solve scaling problems we don't have.

options.name: Postgres (external)
options.desc: Standard SQL, easy to share with other apps you already run. Adds an op dependency; needs connection pooling.
options.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><use href='arch:api' x='2' y='20' width='22' height='14'/><line x1='24' y1='22' x2='40' y2='22' stroke='var(--ink-2)' stroke-width='0.8'/><line x1='24' y1='27' x2='40' y2='27' stroke='var(--ink-2)' stroke-width='0.8'/><line x1='24' y1='32' x2='40' y2='32' stroke='var(--ink-2)' stroke-width='0.8'/><rect x='40' y='18' width='14' height='18' fill='none' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.5' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><text x='47' y='29' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.2' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>pool</text><line x1='54' y1='27' x2='68' y2='27' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='64,24 68,27 64,30' fill='var(--accent)'/><use href='arch:database' x='70' y='20' width='26' height='14'/><text x='83' y='42' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>Postgres</text><text x='50' y='52' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>+ shared SQL, + op dep</text></svg>

options.name: DynamoDB
options.desc: Managed, scales beyond a single VPS. Cheap at this volume. AWS lock-in; breaks the "runs anywhere" story.
options.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><rect x='6' y='6' width='88' height='44' fill='none' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.6' stroke-dasharray='3 2'/><text x='12' y='14' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--ink-3)'>AWS</text><use href='arch:table' x='14' y='20' width='30' height='20'/><use href='arch:table' x='38' y='20' width='30' height='20'/><use href='arch:table' x='62' y='20' width='30' height='20'/><text x='53' y='48' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>DynamoDB</text><text x='50' y='56' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>scales out · AWS lock-in</text></svg>

items.title: Redirect cache strategy
items.desc: How the hot path stays under 50 ms p99 when a popular link gets hammered. The cache is read-mostly: invalidate on update; rebuild on miss.
items.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><use href='arch:api' x='2' y='22' width='22' height='14'/><line x1='24' y1='26' x2='34' y2='26' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='30,23 34,26 30,29' fill='var(--accent)'/><use href='arch:cache' x='36' y='22' width='22' height='14'/><line x1='44' y1='38' x2='44' y2='46' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.5' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><polygon points='41,44 44,48 47,44' fill='var(--ink-3)'/><text x='47' y='14' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--accent)'>hit (hot)</text><text x='30' y='44' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='end'>miss</text><use href='arch:database' x='34' y='46' width='22' height='12'/><line x1='56' y1='52' x2='80' y2='52' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.4' stroke-dasharray='1.5 1.5'/><text x='90' y='30' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='5' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>< 50ms</text><text x='90' y='37' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>p99 budget</text></svg>

options.name: In-process LRU (default)
options.desc: Lives inside the binary. Free, no extra process, lost on restart (cold start is one DB hit per slug). Best for single-instance deploys.
options.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><rect x='10' y='8' width='80' height='40' fill='none' stroke='var(--ink-2)' stroke-width='0.6'/><text x='16' y='16' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--ink-3)'>clipsi (1 proc)</text><use href='arch:cache' x='35' y='22' width='30' height='18'/><text x='50' y='46' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>LRU (in-process)</text><text x='50' y='56' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>lost on restart · 0 extra deps</text></svg>

options.name: Shared Redis
options.desc: Survives restarts, shared across instances behind a load balancer. Adds an op dependency. Pick when you scale horizontally.
options.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><use href='arch:api' x='4' y='6' width='22' height='14'/><use href='arch:api' x='4' y='24' width='22' height='14'/><use href='arch:api' x='4' y='42' width='22' height='14'/><line x1='26' y1='13' x2='52' y2='28' stroke='var(--ink-2)' stroke-width='0.7'/><line x1='26' y1='31' x2='52' y2='30' stroke='var(--ink-2)' stroke-width='0.7'/><line x1='26' y1='49' x2='52' y2='32' stroke='var(--ink-2)' stroke-width='0.7'/><use href='arch:cache' x='54' y='22' width='28' height='18'/><text x='68' y='48' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4.5' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>Redis</text><text x='68' y='55' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>shared · survives restart</text></svg>

options.name: No cache — hit the DB every time
options.desc: Trust the DB's own page cache (works fine for SQLite). Simplest; bets on the storage layer's index being fast enough.

items.title: Analytics pipeline
items.desc: Click events flow from the redirect handler into an event log, get aggregated nightly into per-slug stats. PII stripped at the handler before the event is even written.

options.name: Embedded — same SQLite
options.desc: Click events table in the same SQLite file. One nightly job rolls them into per-slug aggregates. Simplest. Limits analytics queries to what SQLite can do quickly.

options.name: External ClickHouse
options.desc: Columnar OLAP store. Trivial to query 12 months of clicks in <100 ms. Another service to run, ~250 MB RAM minimum.

options.name: Counter-only, no events
options.desc: Increment per-slug counters in the storage backend, throw the rest away. Cheapest. Loses referrers, geo, UA — only total clicks remain.

items.title: Deploy target
items.desc: How the binary actually runs in production. All three options should work from the same artifact — the binary is platform-aware.

options.name: systemd service on a VPS (default)
options.desc: One binary + one .service unit + one .toml config. Matches the "$5 VPS" constraint perfectly. Deploy = scp + systemctl restart.
options.recommendation: OVR-3 names systemd implicitly ("one binary, one config, one $5 VPS"). Docker adds runtime overhead for no gain when there's only one process; k8s is for the scale-out story we explicitly aren't building.

options.name: Docker / Compose
options.desc: Same binary in a 15 MB scratch image. Easier for teams who already have Docker on the box. Adds a tiny runtime cost.

options.name: Kubernetes
options.desc: Helm chart, horizontal scaling, shared Redis cache required (see ENG-3). Overkill for the audience but here for completeness.
